mentions.note: CEO Mary Barra exceptional leader; invest in her, not in EV vs. ICE debate; she'll decide right technology path.
Huge profit boost from great car/truck lineup, highest full-year market share in decade, and benefits from relaxed environmental rules and tariffs; stock up 8.75%.
CEO Mary Barra underappreciated. Stock tends to underperform first hour or two after earnings; good buying opportunity if pattern repeats.
